title: Subjunctive and formal structures
explanation:
Subjunctive and formal structures

After certain adjectives and verbs (essential, vital, recommend, suggest, insist), we use the base form of the verb, especially in formal English.

  • It is essential that he be present.
  • I recommend that she apply early.
  • They insisted that he leave immediately.

questions.text: It is vital that every employee [*be|is|was] informed.
The doctor recommended that she [*rest|rests|rested] for a week.
They insisted that he [*leave|leaves|left] the building.
It is important that the report [*remain|remains|remained] confidential.
I suggest that he [*apply|applies|applied] for the grant.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: It is essential that she ____ on time. | *arrive | arrives | arrived
The committee demanded that the minister ____ an explanation. | *give | gives | gave
It is crucial that the data ____ accurate. | *be | is | was
They proposed that the meeting ____ postponed. | *be | is | was
It is necessary that he [*submit|submits|submitted] the form today.
The rules require that every visitor [*sign|signs|signed] in.
It is imperative that the issue [*be|is|was] resolved quickly.
She requested that I [*not share|do not share|did not share] the file.
The judge ordered that the witness [*remain|remains|remained] silent.
